caption: Two men sit side-by-side in a room, reacting to a video displayed on a smaller screen in front of them. The man on the left has graying hair and wears a dark gray t-shirt. The man on the right has reddish-brown hair and a beard, wearing a similar gray t-shirt and a necklace; he rests his chin on his hand. Behind them is a large television screen featuring the glowing gold text "OUR STUPID REACTIONS". To their right, a shelf is filled with stacked media cases, and a small potted plant sits to the left. A smaller rectangular inset shows a figure enveloped in orange and yellow flames against a dark background. Across the sequence of frames, the men remain relatively still, maintaining focused, neutral expressions while watching the footage. The scene is static, with only minimal shifts in the men's posture and the flickering flames in the inset video.
